positive: Minimalist, highly stylized illustration of a friendly, abstract celestial body – perhaps a smiling, crescent nebula or a gentle, glowing comet, rendered in a vibrant, deep indigo and cosmic teal palette. The subject should be the sole focus, set against a solid, contrasting background of deep matte black. Utilize clean, thick line art and simple, geometric shapes to represent the stellar elements. The composition must be perfectly centered for maximum visual impact on fabric. The style should evoke modern Scandinavian graphic design mixed with cosmic wonder, ensuring crisp edges and a clear silhouette. Perfect for screen printing.
negative: photorealistic, hyperdetailed, noise, blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, poor anatomy, extra limbs, low resolution, messy, dirty, grain
